claim_boundary: Mechanical spike validation only. The owner-confirmed validated verdict, independent inter-rater ceiling, and VM-8 outcome durability remain outside this artifact.

inter_rater.reason: No independent second human labeler was supplied. The same-model ambiguity probe is disclosed as correlated and is not inter-rater reliability.

method.clean_gate: single-run per-dimension kappa vs approved human labels
method.hard_gate: per-dimension kappa of cot@N N-run modal-aggregated vectors vs held-out key, recomputed from per-case vectors

packet_prose_judge.note: The existing Slot B judge is reused; no new judge is validated here.
